state_analysis: We can view the image in the terminal but it’s still not legible enough to extract the position. No embedded FEN/PGN metadata found. We will try to preprocess the image (enlarge, grayscale/threshold) to improve clarity, then render it again at higher resolution to manually read the board. Additionally, we will check for any textual hints inside the PNG via strings.
explanation:
- Search for any textual hints in the PNG with strings.
- Enlarge the image with ImageMagick using nearest-neighbor to avoid blurring, convert to grayscale and normalize/threshold to improve contrast.
- Render the processed image(s) with timg at a large geometry to attempt to clearly identify pieces and squares. If legible, we can then determine the best move and write it to /app/move.txt.
